name: archon-datahub
description: Archon — a self-auditing metadata-governance & lineage agent for DataHub. Connects to a DataHub instance over the DataHub MCP Server, harvests metadata (entities, aspects, lineage, governance), and runs a self-audit that detects metadata contradictions, lineage gaps, and governance violations — producing read-only, human-gated findings.

scripts.test:unit: node --import ./scripts/offline-env.mjs --import tsx --test tests/unit/consistency.test.ts tests/unit/governance.test.ts tests/unit/governed-canary.test.ts tests/unit/datahub-mcp.test.ts tests/unit/pipeline.test.ts tests/unit/live-mappers.test.ts tests/unit/llm.test.ts tests/unit/version-history.test.ts tests/unit/version-history-reader.test.ts tests/unit/blast-radius.test.ts tests/unit/remediation.test.ts tests/unit/exporters.test.ts tests/unit/worker-contracts.test.ts tests/integration/mcp-transport.test.ts tests/integration/version-history-cassette.test.ts tests/integration/http-server.test.ts tests/integration/remediation-mcp.test.ts tests/integration/async-worker.test.ts
scripts.test:security: node --import ./scripts/offline-env.mjs --import tsx --test tests/security/authz-tool-boundary.test.ts tests/security/prompt-injection.test.ts tests/security/engine-injection.test.ts tests/security/data-exposure.test.ts tests/security/remediation-boundary.test.ts tests/security/worker-boundary.test.ts tests/security/governed-canary-boundary.test.ts tests/security/production-posture-boundary.test.ts tests/security/supply-chain-production-binding.test.ts
